questionHtml:
A fusion reaction of one nucleus of hydrogen-2 and one nucleus of hydrogen-3 converts 0.019 u to energy. A fission reaction of one nucleus of uranium-235 converts a mass of 0.190 u to energy.

What is the ratio specific energy of this fusion of hydrogenspecific energy of this fission of uranium?

 

A.  0.1

B.  0.2

C.  5

D.  10

meta.title: A fusion reaction of one nucleus of hydrogen-2 and one nucleus of hydrogen-3 converts 0.019 u to energy. A fission reaction of one nucleus of uranium-235 converts a mass of 0.190 u
